Defines the built-in SyntaxError object and its properties for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines properties and identifiers for the built-in `SyntaxError` object in a JavaScript engine. It uses macros to declare the object identifier and its properties, which include a number property and an object property. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns the identifier `ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_SYNTAX_ERROR` to the `SyntaxError` object. The `NUMBER_VALUE` macro defines a property named `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_LENGTH` with a value of `1` and attributes specified by `ECMA_PROPERTY_FIXED`. The `OBJECT_VALUE` macro sets the `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_PROTOTYPE` property to point to `ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_SYNTAX_ERROR_PROTOTYPE`, also with fixed attributes. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent conflicts with other code.
